ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Continued To Sep-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt appeared by telephone for Timothy Folger (Personal Representative).

The Court informed Counsel that it needs a petition signed by the Administrator, that there is no supplemental inventory and appraisal, that he needs to look over the Probate Examiner's notes, and that he needs to try and get things accomplished. Status on close of estate is continued to September 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Huysentruyt is to have his petition filed one week prior to the hearing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Aug-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Continued To May-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Timothy Folger.

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that about a year ago some small dividend checks came in and consisted of five issues of stock, that it will be about 90-days before they can close the estate and that they are in the process of doing the paper work to liquidate and transfer. Status on close of estate is continued to May 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the estate is not ready to be closed, Mr. Huysentruyt is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration two weeks before the hearing date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Singh. Not reported.
